arts.ttl: Preview: Cardiff City vs. Leeds United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Cardiff City and Leeds United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
Aaron Ashley has taken a look at all of this weekend's Championship matches and provided a score prediction for each game.

arts.ttl: Erol Bulut takes swipe at media in impassioned speech as Cardiff City gear up for Leeds United
arts.sum: It’s normal that I have pressure, when you don’t have the results we are expecting - what the board and the fans are expecting, but I can live with this. Under-fire Cardiff City boss Erol Bulut has taken a swipe at the media ahead of Saturday's showdown with Leeds United.

arts.ttl: 'The new Haaland' Farke snaps back at Leeds United critics after loss
arts.sum: After five games, he has not scored many goals and missed a few chances, but everyone calm down. I know how the mood is after a game like this when we don't score.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke could be finally set to unleash “unplayable” Leeds United sensation properly
arts.sum: Leeds United might be without Manor Solomon in their starting lineup against Cardiff City amid injury concerns, and it opens the door for Daniel Farke to better utilise Willy Gnonto . Leeds team news: Manor Solomon injury doubt for Cardiff

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI to face Cardiff City
arts.sum: Leeds United face off with Cardiff City this weekend needing to get back to winning ways, looking to heap the misery on Erol Bulut as the Bluebirds sit bottom of the table. With Solomon a doubt like Firpo, he’s another that is best rested for the weekend in order to allow someone else to start- than man being Ramazani.

arts.ttl: Under-fire Cardiff boss Bulut will 'never give up'
arts.sum: An impassioned Erol Bulut vows to “never give up” after overseeing Cardiff City's worst start to a season for 35 years.
